name: pubcraft
description: Pubcraft — a Claude skill that produces researched, E-E-A-T-compliant, human-reading articles, LinkedIn posts, X (Twitter) posts, Reddit posts, and Product Hunt launch copy that survive Google's and each platform's current spam and AI-content policies.

plugins.name: pubcraft
plugins.description: Researched, E-E-A-T-compliant content writer for articles and platform-native social posts (LinkedIn, X, Reddit, Product Hunt). Anti-AI-slop style enforcement and YMYL/regulated-vertical compliance handling.
